2017 in KSW 2018 in Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki 2019 in KSW

The year 2018 was the 15th year in the history of the Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki, a mixed martial arts promotion based in Poland. 2018 began with KSW 42.

List of events

[edit]
# Event title Date Arena Location
1 KSW 42: Khalidov vs. Narkun March 3, 2018 Atlas Arena Łódź, Poland
2 KSW 43: Soldić vs. Du Plessis April 14, 2018 Centennial Hall Wrocław, Poland
3 KSW 44: The Game June 9, 2018 Ergo Arena Gdańsk, Poland
4 KSW 45: The Return to Wembley October 6, 2018 Wembley Arena London, England
5 KSW 46: Narkun vs. Khalidov 2 December 1, 2018 Gliwice Arena Gliwice, Poland

Title fights

[edit]

KSW 42: Khalidov vs. Narkun

[edit]
KSW 42: Khalidov vs. Narkun
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateMarch 3, 2018
VenueAtlas Arena
City Łódź, Poland
Event chronology
KSW 41 KSW 42: Khalidov vs. Narkun KSW 43

'KSW 42: Khalidov vs. Narkun' billed as being "champion vs. champion" was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on March 3, 2018, at the Atlas Arena in Łódź, Poland.

Background

[edit]

Chris Fields did not reach Lodz because of storm Emma in Ireland, Iran's Hatef Moeil has stepped in to replace the Irishman and the contest has been switched to heavyweight.

Bonus awards

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:

  • Fight of the Night: Tomasz Narkun vs. Mamed Khalidov
  • Knockout of the Night: Scott Askham
  • Submission of the Night: Tomasz Narkun

Results

[edit]
KSW 42
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Catchweight 93 kg Tomasz Narkun (c) def. Mamed Khalidov (c) Submission (Triangle Choke) 3 1:18
Middleweight 84 kg Scott Askham def. Michał Materla KO (Kick to the Body and Head) 1 1:09
Lightweight 70 kg Mateusz Gamrot (c) def. Grzegorz Szulakowski Submission (Americana) 4 4:15 For the KSW Lightweight Championship
Women's Flyweight 57 kg Ariane Lipski (c) def. Silvana Gómez Juárez Decision (Unanimous) 5 5:00 For the KSW Women's Flyweight Championship
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Martin Zawada def. Lukasz Jurkowski TKO (Corner Stoppage) 1 5:00
Heavyweight 120 kg Marcin Wójcik def. Hatef Moeil TKO (Retirement) 2 5:00
Women's Flyweight 57 kg Karolina Owczarz def. Paulina Raszewska Submission (Rear-Naked Choke) 1 1:00
Featherweight 66 kg Filip Wolański def. Bartłomiej Kopera Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Welterweight 77 kg Krystian Kaszubowski def. Christopher Henze TKO (Punches) 1 1:10

[1]

KSW 43: Soldić vs. Du Plessis

[edit]
KSW 43: Soldić vs. Du Plessis

DateApril 14, 2018
VenueCentennial Hall
City Wrocław, Poland
Event chronology
KSW 42 KSW 43: Soldić vs. Du Plessis KSW 44

'KSW 43: Soldić vs. Du Plessis' was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on April 14, 2018, at the Centennial Hall in Wrocław, Poland.

Background

[edit]

Bonus awards

The following fighters will be awarded bonuses:

  • Fight of the Night: David Zawada vs. Michał Michalski
  • Knockout of the Night: Dricus du Plessis & Damian Janikowski
  • Submission of the Night: David Zawada

Results

[edit]
KSW 43
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Welterweight 77 kg Dricus du Plessis def. Roberto Soldić (c) KO (Punches) 2 1:38 For the KSW Welterweight Championship

Heavyweight 120 kg Phil De Fries def. Michał Andryszak TKO (Punches) 1 3:32 For the Vacant KSW Heavyweight Championship

KSW 44: The Game

[edit]
KSW 44: The Game
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateJune 9, 2018
VenueErgo Arena
City Gdańsk, Poland
Event chronology
KSW 43 KSW 44: The Game KSW 45

'KSW 44: The Game' was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on June 9, 2018, at the Ergo Arena in Gdańsk, Poland.

Background

[edit]

The original co-main event featured the rematch between Marcin Wrzosek and Kleber Koike Erbst for the vacant featherweight title. However Wrzosek suffered a pectoral muscle tear and was forced out of the rematch. As a result, Marian Ziolkowski stepped in against Erbst in a catchweight fight.

Bonus awards

The following fighters were awarded bonuses:

  • Fight of the Night: Daniel Torres vs. Filip Wolański
  • Knockout of the Night: Erko Jun
  • Submission of the Night: Kleber Koike Erbst

Results

[edit]
KSW 44
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Heavyweight 120 kg Karol Bedorf def. Mariusz Pudzianowski Submission (Kimura) 1 1:51
Middleweight 84 kg Michał Materla def. Martin Zawada TKO (Punches) 2 2:58
Heavyweight 120 kg Erko Jun def. Tomasz Oświeciński KO (Punch) 1 2:21
Featherweight 68 kg Kleber Koike Erbst def. Marian Ziółkowski Submission (Armbar) 1 3:44
Featherweight 66 kg Daniel Torres def. Filip Wolański Decision (Split) 3 5:00
Lightweight 70 kg Gracjan Szadziński def. Paul Redmond KO (Punches) 2 1:36
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Wagner Prado def. Chris Field TKO (Punches) 2 2:17
Featherweight 66 kg Łukasz Rajewski def. Leo Zulić Submission (Ankle Lock) 1 1:48
Bantamweight 61 kg Sebastian Przybysz def. Dawid Gralka KO (Punches) 1 1:48

KSW 45: The Return to Wembley

[edit]
KSW 45: The Return to Wembley
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateOctober 6, 2018
VenueWembley Arena
City London, England
Event chronology
KSW 44 KSW 45: The Return to Wembley KSW 46

'KSW 45: The Return to Wembley' was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on October 6, 2018, at the Wembley Arena in London, England.

Background

[edit]

Michał Andryszak got injured, Thiago Silva steps in on short notice to replace Andryszak against James McSweeney.

John Smith withdrew from his bout with Akop Szostak. Akop Szostak (3-2) will now face Jamie Sloane, who step in on less than two weeks’ notice.

Max Nunes no-showed KSW's fight week obligations, Lukasz Parobiec steps up on two days' notice to face Wagner Prado.

Akop Szostak vs. Jamie Sloane ruled a no-contest following an accidental eye poke in the first round.

Bonus awards

The following fighters will be awarded bonuses:

  • Fight of the Night: Roberto Soldić vs. Dricus du Plessis
  • Knockout of the Night: Wagner Prado and Scott Askham
  • Submission of the Night: Phil De Fries

Results

[edit]
KSW 45
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Heavyweight 120 kg Phil De Fries (c) def. Karol Bedorf Submission (Americana) 2 4:26 For the KSW Heavyweight Championship
Heavyweight 120 kg Erko Jun def. Paweł "Popek" Rak TKO (punches) 2 2:08
Middleweight 84 kg Michał Materla def. Damian Janikowski TKO (punches) 1 3:10 Tournament Semi-Finals
Welterweight 77 kg Roberto Soldić def. Dricus du Plessis (c) TKO (punches) 3 2:33 For the KSW Welterweight Championship
Middleweight 84 kg Scott Askham def. Marcin Wójcik KO (Kick to the Body and Punches) 1 1:37 Tournament Semi-Finals
Heavyweight 120 kg Thiago Silva def. James McSweeney Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Wagner Prado def. Łukasz Parobiec KO (Punch) 1 0:40
Light Heavyweight 93 kg Jamie Sloane Akop Szostak No Contest (Eye Poke) 1
Lightweight 70 kg Leszek Krakowski def. Alfie Davis Decision (Split) 3 5:00

KSW 46: Narkun vs. Khalidov 2

[edit]
KSW 46: Narkun vs. Khalidov 2
PromotionKonfrontacja Sztuk Walki
DateDecember 1, 2018
VenueGliwice Arena
City Gliwice, Poland
Event chronology
KSW 45 KSW 46: Narkun vs. Khalidov 2 KSW 47

'KSW 46: Narkun vs. Khalidov 2' was a mixed martial arts event held by Konfrontacja Sztuk Walki on December 1, 2018, at the Gliwice Arena in Gliwice, Poland.

Background

[edit]

Borys Mańkowski suffered an injury during training and was forced to withdraw from his fight against Bruce Souto. The bout was canceled.

Also a severe hand injury forced Gracjan Szadziński to withdraw from his showdown with Marian Ziółkowski, Grzegorz Szulakowski stepped in on a short notice to face Ziółkowski.

Bonus awards

The following fighters will be awarded bonuses:

  • Fight of the Night: Tomasz Narkun vs. Mamed Khalidov and Romaz Szymanski vs. Daniel Torres
  • Knockout of the Night: Roberto Soldić and Krystian Kaszubowski

Results

[edit]
KSW 46
Weight Class Method Round Time Notes
Catchweight 92 kg Tomasz Narkun def. Mamed Khalidov Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Featherweight 66 kg Mateusz Gamrot def. Kleber Koike Erbst Decision (Unanimous) 5 5:00 For the Vacant KSW Featherweight Championship
Featherweight 66 kg Salahdine Parnasse def. Marcin Wrzosek Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Catchweight 80 kg Roberto Soldić def. Vinicius Bohrer KO (Punch) 1 4:34
Featherweight 66 kg Roman Szymański def. Daniel Torres Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Lightweight 70 kg Marian Ziółkowski def. Grzegorz Szulakowski Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Lightweight 70 kg Artur Sowiński def. Kamil Szymuszowski Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Bantamweight 61 kg Antun Račić def. Sebastian Przybysz Decision (Unanimous) 3 5:00
Welterweight 77 kg Krystian Kaszubowski def. Michal Michalski KO (Punches) 1 2:14
